ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Regex to match on. Tests against full file path relative to the root of the vault, including file extension.
ast.target: 用于匹配的正则表达式。测试相对于仓库根目录的完整文件路径，包括文件扩展名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to match on. Includes subfolders of this folder.
ast.target: 要匹配的文件夹。包含此文件夹的子文件夹。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: No templates folder set. Please set the template folder location on the previous page.
ast.target: 未设置模板文件夹。请在上一页设置模板文件夹位置。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: No templates found in the templates folder.
ast.target: 在模板文件夹中未找到模板。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` failed because your server does not serve wasm with `application/wasm` MIME type. Falling back to `WebAssembly.instantiate` which is slower. Original error:
ast.target: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` 失败，因为您的服务器未以 `application/wasm` MIME 类型提供 wasm。回退到较慢的 `WebAssembly.instantiate`。原始错误：\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Templater: Failed to enter insert mode for vim users.
ast.target: Templater：为 vim 用户进入插入模式失败。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Files in this folder will be available as templates.
ast.target: 此文件夹中的文件将作为模板可用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Adds syntax highlighting for Templater commands in edit mode.
ast.target: 在编辑模式下为 Templater 命令添加语法高亮。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Adds syntax highlighting for Templater commands in edit mode on mobile. Use with caution: this may break live preview on mobile platforms.
ast.target: 在移动设备编辑模式下为 Templater 命令添加语法高亮。请谨慎使用：这可能会破坏移动平台上的实时预览。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Templates that run once when Templater starts. These output nothing and are useful for setting up event hooks.
ast.target: Templater 启动时运行一次的模板。这些模板不产生输出，可用于设置事件钩子。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: New files created in these folders will never trigger Templater.
ast.target: 在这些文件夹中创建的新文件将永远不会触发 Templater。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Determine how you'd like to have user script intellisense render. Note values will not render if not in the script.
ast.target: 确定您希望用户脚本智能感知如何渲染。如果不在脚本中，笔记值将不会渲染。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum timeout in seconds for a system command.
ast.target: 系统命令的最大超时时间（秒）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Template file path (relative to vault root or templates folder)
ast.target: 模板文件路径（相对于仓库根目录或模板文件夹）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Output file path (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 输出文件路径（相对于仓库根目录）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open the created file in the UI
ast.target: 在用户界面中打开创建的文件

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes the app instance. Prefer to use this over the global app instance.
ast.target: 此模块公开了 app 实例。建议优先使用此实例而非全局 app 实例。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes custom made scripts, written by yourself within the script file folder location
ast.target: 此模块公开了自定义脚本，这些脚本由您自己在脚本文件夹位置内编写。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This module exposes Templater's running configuration.

This is mostly useful when writing scripts requiring some context information.
ast.target:
此模块公开了 Templater 的运行配置。

这在编写需要一些上下文信息的脚本时非常有用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `TFile` object representing the template file.
ast.target: 表示模板文件的 `TFile` 对象。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `TFile` object representing the target file where the template will be inserted.
ast.target: 表示模板将被插入的目标文件的 `TFile` 对象。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `RunMode`, representing the way Templater was launched (Create new from template, Append to active file, ...).
ast.target: `RunMode`，表示 Templater 的启动方式（从模板创建新文件、追加到活动文件等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The active file (if existing) when launching Templater.
ast.target: 启动 Templater 时的活动文件（如果存在）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module contains every internal function related to dates.
ast.target: 此模块包含与日期相关的所有内部函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format for the date. Defaults to `"YYYY-MM-DD"`. Refer to the [Momentjs format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).
ast.target: 日期的格式。默认为 `\"YYYY-MM-DD\"`。请参考 [Momentjs 格式参考](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Duration to offset the date from. If a number is provided, duration will be added to the date in days. You can also specify the offset as a string using the ISO 8601 format.
ast.target: 用于偏移日期的持续时间。如果提供数字，持续时间将以天为单位添加到日期中。您也可以使用 ISO 8601 格式将偏移量指定为字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The date to use instead of today's date, e.g. set this to the note's title.
ast.target: 用于替代今天日期的日期，例如将其设置为笔记的标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format for the reference date. Refer to the [Momentjs format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).
ast.target: 参考日期的格式。请参考 [Momentjs 格式参考](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Week day number. If the locale assigns Monday as the first day of the week, `0` will be Monday, `-7` will be last week's day.
ast.target: 星期几的数字。如果区域设置将星期一作为一周的第一天，则 `0` 为星期一，`-7` 为上周的同一天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reference date to use instead of today, e.g. set this to the note's title.
ast.target: 用于替代今天的参考日期，例如将其设置为笔记的标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module contains every internal function related to files.
ast.target: 此模块包含与文件相关的所有内部函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The string contents of the file at the time that Templater was executed. Manipulating this string will *not* update the current file.
ast.target: Templater 执行时文件的字符串内容。操作此字符串 *不会* 更新当前文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a new file using a specified template or with a specified content.
ast.target: 使用指定模板或指定内容创建新文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Either the template used for the new file content, or the file content as a string. If it is the template to use, you retrieve it with `tp.file.find_tfile(TEMPLATENAME)`.
ast.target: 用于新文件内容的模板，或作为字符串的文件内容。如果它是要使用的模板，您可以通过 `tp.file.find_tfile(TEMPLATENAME)` 获取它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The filename of the new file, defaults to "Untitled".
ast.target: 新文件的文件名，默认为 \"Untitled\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to open or not the newly created file. Warning: if you use this option, since commands are executed asynchronously, the file can be opened first and then other commands are appended to that new file and not the previous file.
ast.target: 是否打开新创建的文件。警告：如果您使用此选项，由于命令是异步执行的，文件可能会先被打开，然后其他命令被追加到该新文件而不是之前的文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The folder to put the new file in, defaults to Obsidian's default location. If you want the file to appear in a different folder, specify it with `"PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME"` or `tp.app.vault.getAbstractFileByPath("PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME")`.
ast.target: 放置新文件的文件夹，默认为 Obsidian 的默认位置。如果您希望文件出现在不同的文件夹中，请使用 `\"PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME\"` 或 `tp.app.vault.getAbstractFileByPath(\"PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME\")` 指定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the current file's creation date.
ast.target: 获取当前文件的创建日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format for the date. Defaults to `"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"`. Refer to [format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).
ast.target: 日期的格式。默认为 `\"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm\"`。请参考 [格式参考](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Sets the cursor to this location after the template has been inserted. 

You can navigate between the different cursors using the configured hotkey in Obsidian settings.
ast.target:
模板插入后将光标设置到此位置。

您可以使用 Obsidian 设置中配置的快捷键在不同的光标之间导航。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The order of the different cursors jump, e.g. it will jump from 1 to 2 to 3, and so on.
If you specify multiple tp.file.cursor with the same order, the editor will switch to multi-cursor.
ast.target: 不同光标跳转的顺序，例如它将从 1 跳转到 2 再到 3，依此类推。\n如果您指定多个具有相同顺序的 tp.file.cursor，编辑器将切换到多光标模式。\n

ast.name: description
ast.source: Appends some content after the active cursor in the file.
ast.target: 在文件中活动光标后追加一些内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The content to append after the active cursor.
ast.target: 要在活动光标后追加的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check to see if a file exists by it's file path. The full path to the file, relative to the Vault and containing the extension, must be provided.
ast.target: 通过文件路径检查文件是否存在。必须提供相对于仓库并包含扩展名的文件完整路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full file path of the file we want to check existence for.
ast.target: 我们要检查存在性的文件的完整文件路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for a file and returns its `TFile` instance.
ast.target: 搜索文件并返回其 `TFile` 实例。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The filename we want to search and resolve as a `TFile`.
ast.target: 我们要搜索并解析为 `TFile` 的文件名。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 获取文件的文件夹名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to `true`, returns the vault-absolute path of the folder. If `false`, only returns the basename of the folder (the last part). Defaults to `false`.
ast.target: 如果设置为 `true`，则返回文件夹的仓库绝对路径。如果为 `false`，则仅返回文件夹的基本名称（最后一部分）。默认为 `false`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Includes the file's link content. Templates in the included content will be resolved.
ast.target: 包含文件的链接内容。包含内容中的模板将被解析。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The link to the file to include, e.g. `"[[MyFile]]"`, or a TFile object. Also supports sections or blocks inclusions.
ast.target: 要包含的文件链接，例如 `\"[[MyFile]]\"`，或一个 TFile 对象。也支持包含章节或块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the file's last modification date.
ast.target: 检索文件的最后修改日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moves the file to the desired vault location.
ast.target: 将文件移动到所需的保险库位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new vault relative path of the file, without the file extension. Note: the new path needs to include the folder and the filename, e.g. `"/Notes/MyNote"`.
ast.target: 文件在保险库中的新相对路径，不包含文件扩展名。注意：新路径需要包含文件夹和文件名，例如 `\"/Notes/MyNote\"`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The file to move, defaults to the current file.
ast.target: 要移动的文件，默认为当前文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the file's absolute path on the system.
ast.target: 检索文件在系统上的绝对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to `true`, only retrieves the vault's relative path.
ast.target: 如果设置为 `true`，则只检索保险库的相对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Renames the file (keeps the same file extension).
ast.target: 重命名文件（保留相同的文件扩展名）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the active file's text selection.
ast.target: 检索活动文件的文本选择。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the file's tags (array of string).
ast.target: 检索文件的标签（字符串数组）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This modules exposes all the frontmatter variables of a file as variables.
ast.target: 此模块将文件的所有前置元数据变量作为变量公开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes hooks that allow you to execute code when a Templater event occurs.
ast.target: 此模块公开了允许您在 Templater 事件发生时执行代码的钩子。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Hooks into when all actively running templates have finished executing. Most of the time this will be a single template, unless you are using `tp.file.include` or `tp.file.create_new`.

Multiple invokations of this method will have their callback functions run in parallel.
ast.target: 钩入所有正在运行的模板都已执行完毕的时刻。大多数情况下这会是单个模板，除非您正在使用 `tp.file.include` 或 `tp.file.create_new`。\n\n多次调用此方法将并行运行它们的回调函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Callback function that will be executed when all actively running templates have finished executing.
ast.target: 当所有正在运行的模板都已执行完毕时将被执行的回调函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes all the functions and classes from the Obsidian API.
ast.target: 此模块公开了 Obsidian API 中的所有函数和类。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module contains system related functions.
ast.target: 此模块包含与系统相关的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spawns a prompt modal and returns the user's input.
ast.target: 生成一个提示模态框并返回用户的输入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text placed above the input field.
ast.target: 放置在输入字段上方的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A default value for the input field.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Throws an error if the prompt is canceled, instead of returning a `null` value.
ast.target: 如果提示被取消，则抛出错误，而不是返回 `null` 值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to `true`, the input field will be a multiline textarea. Defaults to `false`.
ast.target: 如果设置为 `true`，输入字段将是一个多行文本区域。默认为 `false`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spawns a suggester prompt and returns the user's chosen item.
ast.target: 生成一个建议器提示并返回用户选择的项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of strings representing the text that will be displayed for each item in the suggester prompt. This can also be a function that maps an item to its text representation.
ast.target: 字符串数组，表示将在建议器提示中为每个项目显示的文本。这也可以是一个将项目映射到其文本表示的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array containing the values of each item in the correct order.
ast.target: 包含每个项目值的数组，按正确顺序排列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of items rendered at once (useful to improve performance when displaying large lists).
ast.target: 限制一次渲染的项目数量（在显示大型列表时有助于提高性能）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default value to initialize the suggester with.
ast.target: 用于初始化建议器的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spawns a suggester prompt that supports selecting multiple items and returns the user's chosen items.
ast.target: 生成一个支持选择多个项目的建议器提示，并返回用户选择的项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text placed at the top of the modal.
ast.target: 放置在模态框顶部的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default values to initialize the suggester with.
ast.target: 用于初始化建议器的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This modules contains every internal function related to the web (making web requests).
ast.target: 此模块包含与网络（发出网络请求）相关的所有内部函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves and parses the daily quote from `https://github.com/Zachatoo/quotes-database` as a callout.
ast.target: 从 `https://github.com/Zachatoo/quotes-database` 检索并解析每日引言，作为标注框显示。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 从 `https://unsplash.com/` 获取一张随机图片。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 图片尺寸，格式为 `<宽度>x<高度>`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limits selection to photos matching a search term. Multiple search terms can be passed separated by a comma.
ast.target: 将选择范围限制为与搜索词匹配的照片。多个搜索词可以用逗号分隔传递。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional argument to include the specified size in the image link markdown. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 可选参数，用于在图片链接 Markdown 中包含指定的尺寸。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes a HTTP request to the specified URL. Optionally, you can specify a path to extract specific data from the response.
ast.target: 向指定的 URL 发出 HTTP 请求。可选地，您可以指定一个路径来从响应中提取特定数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL to which the HTTP request will be made.
ast.target: 将发出 HTTP 请求的 URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A path within the response JSON to extract specific data.
ast.target: 响应 JSON 中用于提取特定数据的路径。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Trigger Templater on new file creation
ast.target: 在新文件创建时触发 Templater

ast.name: name
ast.target: 添加文件正则表达式模板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 启用用户系统命令函数

ast.name: name
ast.source: Replace templates in the active file
ast.target: 替换活动文件中的模板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 跳转到下一个光标位置

ast.name: name
ast.target: 文件标题日期 + 1 天（明天）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 文件标题日期 - 1 天（昨天）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 文件标题中的上一个周一

ast.name: name
ast.source: Get start of month from note title
ast.target: 从笔记标题获取月初日期

ast.name: name
ast.source: Get end of month from note title
ast.target: 从笔记标题获取月末日期

ast.name: name
ast.source: File creation and open created note
ast.target: 创建文件并打开创建的笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在当前文件夹中创建文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: File creation in specified folder with string path
ast.target: 在指定路径的文件夹中创建文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: File creation in specified folder with TFolder
ast.target: 在指定TFolder文件夹中创建文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: File creation and append link to current note
ast.target: 创建文件并在当前笔记中追加链接

ast.name: name
ast.target: 带格式的文件创建日期

ast.name: name
ast.target: 文件所在文件夹（库绝对路径）

ast.name: name
ast.source: File last modified date with format
ast.target: 带格式的文件最后修改日期

ast.name: name
ast.source: File relative path (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 文件相对路径（相对于库根目录）

ast.name: name
ast.source: File append a 2 to the file name

ast.name: name
ast.source: Strip the Zettelkasten ID of title (if space separated)
ast.target: 去除标题中的Zettelkasten ID（如果以空格分隔）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Suggester with mapping function (same as above example)
ast.target: 带映射函数的建议器（同上例）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Multi-suggester with mapping function (same as above example)
ast.target: 带映射函数的多选建议器（同上例）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Random picture with size and query
ast.target: 带尺寸和查询的随机图片

ast.name: text
ast.target: 请查看控制台获取更多信息

ast.name: text
ast.source: Only enable this if you trust the current and future contents of this vault, including files you may later download, copy, or sync from other people.
ast.target: 仅当您信任此库的当前及未来内容（包括您可能稍后下载、复制或从他人处同步的文件）时才启用此选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This setting is stored on this device only; enable it separately on each device where you use this vault.
ast.target: 此设置仅存储在此设备上；请在您使用此库的每台设备上单独启用它。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This setting is stored on this device only and must be enabled separately on each device.
ast.target: 此设置仅存储在当前设备上，需要在每台设备上单独启用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: None: Do not auto apply templates. Templater will still listen for the new file creation event and replace every command it finds in the new file's content.
ast.target: 无：不自动应用模板。Templater 仍会监听新文件创建事件，并替换新文件内容中找到的每个命令。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Folder templates: Apply templates based on folder structure.
ast.target: 文件夹模板：基于文件夹结构应用模板。

ast.name: text
ast.source: File regex templates: Apply templates based on regex file name patterns.
ast.target: 文件正则表达式模板：基于正则表达式文件名模式应用模板。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Trigger Templater on new file creation
ast.target: 在新文件创建时触发 Templater

ast.name: title
ast.target: 启用用户系统命令功能

ast.name: warning
ast.source: This can be dangerous if you set a startup template with unknown/unsafe content. Make sure that every startup template's content is safe.
ast.target: 如果设置了包含未知/不安全内容的启动模板，这可能会很危险。请确保每个启动模板的内容都是安全的。

ast.name: warning
ast.source: This can be dangerous if you create new files with unknown / unsafe content on creation. Make sure that every new file's content is safe on creation.
ast.target: 如果在创建新文件时包含未知/不安全的内容，这可能会很危险。请确保每个新文件在创建时的内容都是安全的。

ast.name: warning
ast.source: It can be dangerous to execute arbitrary system commands from untrusted sources. Only run system commands that you understand, from trusted sources.
ast.target: 执行来自不受信任来源的任意系统命令可能很危险。请仅运行您理解的、来自受信任来源的系统命令。
